channel.title: Posts on Sophy's SEO Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Posts on Sophy's SEO Portfolio

item.title: Seo Audit Sample
item.description:
🔷️Categorizing Onsite SEO Auditing:

🟡 Technical Health: Indexation Sitemap Robots.txt Url structure* Canonicals Redirects Broken links Seo metadata*🤎 Tech stack* Structured data Faq schema*

🟡 Trust and Authority: Trust pages Ssl cert Backlinks

🟡 Performance and Speed: Core web vitals Pagespeed* Security headers* (added to Trust and Authority **)

🟡 Design & UX: Image Optimization Mobile viewport Modern design Added: touch targets**

🟡 Visibility: Organic traffic Paid traffic* Keyword ranking AI visibility **added: seo metadata
